title: polaxis
description:
Polaxis is an AI agent firewall and governance platform. 
7-layer detection pipeline intercepting every tool call 
before execution. 98% accuracy on adversarial test suite. 
Sub-50ms policy enforcement. Human-in-the-loop approvals 
for high-risk actions. Budget controls with hard spend caps. 
SHA-256 hash-chained immutable audit trail. One-click SOC2, 
GDPR, HIPAA, EU AI Act, and OWASP compliance reports.

items: Monitor agent memory mutation patterns for drift, Detect task replay, infinite delegation, or hallucination loops.
Enable human-in-the-loop (HITL) override thresholds on high-risk or ambiguous actions, LLM Incident Detection & Response, Runtime guardrails & moderation; anomalous tool use
